summary: Implemented Write-note to Home-protocol draft promotion with typed Write-note origin metadata, duplicate prevention, no active-run creation, Home protocol route-back affordances, and Today Continue guard coverage so promoted protocol templates do not surface unless a run is explicitly active.

contract_status_changes.before: Partially implemented for Today and Home tasks
contract_status_changes.after: Partially implemented for Today, Home tasks, and Home protocol drafts/templates

residual_risks: No running-app smoke, flow verification, screenshot proof, real-device proof, or TestFlight proof was performed for the new Write Add to Protocol and Home protocol source-note affordances.
Permanent-note promotion remains contract-only and was not implemented in this slice.
Promotion affordance discoverability across all Write destinations still needs a separate visible promotion/status affordance slice.
